product_overview: AI Content Planner is a web app that helps marketing teams and content creators generate AI-powered content ideas and schedules, manage projects and tasks, track time, and review basic productivity analytics. It combines AI generation and conversational assistance with project and time management to streamline content planning.
core_goals: Quickly generate actionable content ideas tailored to a niche, platform, goal, and audience
Automatically produce a content publishing schedule based on frequency and campaign parameters
Create and manage content projects and task workflows with assignees and statuses
Track time spent on tasks to inform productivity and future duration estimates
Use a conversational AI assistant for content strategy and planning

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register, sign in, and access their workspace using JWT-based authentication so they can manage projects and AI features.
user_flows: Open app -> Choose to register -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit registration -> See workspace creation prompt
Open app -> Choose to sign in -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit login -> See dashboard
Open app -> Choose to register -> Enter invalid email -> Enter password -> Submit registration -> See validation error about email format

features.name: Onboarding & Workspace Setup
features.description: Guide new users through creating a workspace, adding a first project, and configuring basic settings so teams can start planning content.
user_flows: Complete registration or sign in -> Create workspace -> Enter workspace name -> Add initial team members or skip -> Create first project -> See project overview
Sign in -> Open workspace settings -> Rename workspace -> Add or remove members -> Save changes

features.name: AI Content Idea Generator
features.description: Generate multiple content ideas (title, hook, format, caption draft, CTA) from user inputs like niche, platform, goal, target audience, and desired count.
user_flows: Open idea generator -> Provide niche -> Provide platform -> Provide goal -> Provide target audience -> Specify number of ideas -> Submit generation -> See list of generated ideas with title, hook, format, caption draft, and CTA
Open idea generator -> Provide niche -> Provide platform -> Leave target audience empty -> Submit generation -> See generated ideas tailored to provided inputs

features.name: AI Content Schedule Generator
features.description: Create a content publishing schedule (calendar view) based on frequency, platform, campaign theme, and campaign duration.
user_flows: Open schedule generator -> Specify content frequency per week -> Select platform -> Enter campaign theme -> Set campaign duration -> Submit -> See content calendar visualization by week
Open schedule generator -> Specify one content item per week -> Select platform -> Submit -> See simplified weekly calendar

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create projects and manage task lists with status tracking (backlog, in progress, review, done) and assign team members to tasks.
user_flows: Open projects -> Create project -> Enter project name and dates -> Add team members -> Create tasks for the project -> See task list with statuses
Open a project -> Create a task -> Enter task title and optional description -> Assign team member -> Set task status to Backlog -> See task appear in backlog

features.name: Time Tracker
features.description: Start and stop timers on tasks to record time entries used for productivity analysis and historical tracking.
user_flows: Open a task -> Start timer -> Work on task -> Stop timer -> See time entry logged with duration
Open a task -> Start timer -> Stop timer after short work period -> Edit time entry to correct duration -> Save edits -> See updated total time

features.name: AI Task Prediction
features.description: Predict task duration using historical time tracking data to help with planning and estimates.
user_flows: Open a task -> Request duration prediction -> System returns predicted duration and confidence -> See prediction and use it to set a deadline
Open a task with minimal history -> Request duration prediction -> See prediction accompanied by low-confidence note

features.name: AI Chat Assistant
features.description: Interact with a conversational AI to get content strategy advice, content ideas, caption templates, and posting recommendations.
user_flows: Open AI chat assistant -> Enter a content strategy prompt (e.g., request 30 ideas) -> Submit prompt -> See assistant reply with ideas and recommendations
Open AI chat assistant -> Ask how to improve engagement for a platform -> Submit -> See tactical suggestions and recommended post formats

features.name: Productivity Analytics (Basic)
features.description: View basic productivity metrics such as total tasks completed, average task duration, and consistency trends to inform planning.
user_flows: Open analytics dashboard -> Select date range -> View summary metrics including total tasks completed and average duration -> Drill into task duration breakdowns
Open analytics dashboard -> View consistency tracking -> See week-over-week posting consistency summary

ai_content_idea_generator.output: title, hook, format, caption draft, cta

project_management: status tracking (backlog, in progress, review, done)
ai_task_prediction: predicts task duration based on history
onboarding: initial setup flow for new users and workspaces
